buffer_pool.h(3) Library Functions Manual buffer_pool.h(3)

NAME

buffer_pool.h - 🗃️ Lock-Free Unified Memory Buffer Pool with Lazy Allocation

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct buffer_node
Node header embedded before user data. struct buffer_pool
Unified buffer pool with lock-free fast path.

Macros


#define BUFFER_POOL_MAX_BYTES (337 * 1024 * 1024)
Maximum total bytes the pool can hold (337 MB). #define BUFFER_POOL_SHRINK_DELAY_NS 5000000000ULL
Time before unused buffers are freed (5 seconds in nanoseconds). #define BUFFER_POOL_MIN_SIZE 64
Minimum buffer size to pool (smaller allocations use malloc directly). #define BUFFER_POOL_MAX_SINGLE_SIZE (4 * 1024 * 1024)
Maximum single buffer size to pool (larger allocations use malloc directly). #define BUFFER_POOL_MAGIC MAGIC_BUFFER_POOL_VALID
Magic value to identify pooled buffers - Alias for backward compatibility. #define BUFFER_POOL_MAGIC_FALLBACK MAGIC_BUFFER_POOL_FALLBACK
Magic value for malloc fallback buffers (not in pool) - Alias for backward compatibility. #define POOL_ALLOC(size)
#define POOL_FREE(data, size)

Typedefs


typedef struct buffer_node buffer_node_t
Node header embedded before user data. typedef struct buffer_pool buffer_pool_t
Unified buffer pool with lock-free fast path.

Functions


buffer_pool_t * buffer_pool_create (size_t max_bytes, uint64_t shrink_delay_ns)
Create a new buffer pool. void buffer_pool_destroy (buffer_pool_t *pool)
Destroy a buffer pool and free all memory. void * buffer_pool_alloc (buffer_pool_t *pool, size_t size)
Allocate a buffer from the pool (lock-free fast path). void buffer_pool_free (buffer_pool_t *pool, const void *data, size_t size)
Free a buffer back to the pool (lock-free). void buffer_pool_shrink (buffer_pool_t *pool)
Force shrink the pool (free old unused buffers). void buffer_pool_get_stats (buffer_pool_t *pool, size_t *current_bytes, size_t *used_bytes, size_t *free_bytes)
Get pool statistics (atomic reads). void buffer_pool_log_stats (buffer_pool_t *pool, const char *name)
Log pool statistics. void buffer_pool_init_global (void)
void buffer_pool_cleanup_global (void)
buffer_pool_t * buffer_pool_get_global (void)

Detailed Description

🗃️ Lock-Free Unified Memory Buffer Pool with Lazy Allocation

Definition in file buffer_pool.h.
